review: This Contemporary American spot is a solid choice that delivers on all the things I look for in a dining experience. The farm-to-table focus really shows — every dish felt fresh and carefully prepared with quality ingredients that made a difference in flavor. I appreciated the knowledgeable, attentive staff who made solid recommendations and kept things running smoothly. Generous portions and good value at moderate prices, plus that cozy, rustic-chic ambiance with exposed brick and soft lighting makes it a comfortable spot for any occasion. The innovative cocktails and thoughtful wine list are a nice bonus too. I'll definitely be back and highly recommend giving it a try.
